messages.author: zoe
messages.text: Finance wants a year of Stripe envelopes, while the Kafka audit topic does not need to live forever.

messages.author: priya
messages.text: Keep Kafka for 30 days and archive envelopes for one year. Storage goes up, but incident replay stays practical.

messages.author: liam
messages.text: Would a compacted topic alone cover the analysts use case?
